relationships.mateo-yuki: Recognition. Two people who see systems from the inside.

events: T1-T5: Detection, confirmation, leaks, the box.
T6-T9: Confirmation, paradox, teleportation, 0.9743 written, institutions form.
T13: Construction begins. Helena Cavalcanti. The prototype geometry changes; 0.9743 remains. The cable in the corridor.
T14-15: Mateo transferred. Packs Paranal. Arrives at complex. Begins auditing. Meets Yuki. Workaround file grows.
T16-17: Nadia sees power deviations — within tolerances. Kwame sees echo before signal — writes tech note. Mateo's file grows.
T18-21: Mateo finds the 0.9743 — traces it to prototype an 2, geometry changed an 6. Tells Yuki. Report filed, classified. Tolérances.
T22-23: Three documents — Mateo's report, Kwame's note, Ephrem's email. No one reads all three. Puzzle stays in pieces.
T24-25: Last days. Pre-activation sequence begins. The cable. Yuki calls her mother. The 0.9743 in yellow on Mateo's screen.

T26-27: L'activation. Four perspectives interwoven. Mateo's fourteen seconds — doesn't act. Kwame says 'This is unacceptable' — lost in noise. The system fires. Yuki recognizes the Rubin pattern. Mateo sees the offset.
T28: Le silence. Mateo at his screen, Rodrigo beside him. 'No sé lo que hemos hecho.' Yuki walks into the desert at dawn.
T29-30: La boîte. Yuki in La Serena. Opens the box. Reads the first page. The gesture is enough.
player_choices: T26: Activation — all four perspectives interwoven
